settings.label: Max X (panel units)
settings.comment: Used by display_handler in Stage 4b to clamp / scale the raw x reading into LVGL display coordinates.

settings.label: Swap X / Y
settings.comment: Some 1024x600 panels mount the touch sensor rotated; display_handler will swap raw x / raw y before passing to LVGL when this is true. Stage 4a publishes the raw chip output regardless.
